theme_and_archetype.description: Patients/communities need warmth, calm, trust. Dark UI feels clinical/cold. Warm sand and deep forest green provide a grounded, community-focused feel suitable for a masjid management tool.

spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Neumorphism (Clay & Crisp): White or Off-white background, soft shadow (shadow-sm), sharp 1px border (border-[#EAE6DD]). Avoid standard card component heavily, use flat rectangular bounds.
spacing_and_layout.alignment_rules: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, dense content. Buttons align relative to container.

components.tables: Mobile: Avoid horizontal scroll. Use card-based stacking or Overview/Details split (click row to see modal). Desktop: Shadcn Table. Use IBM Plex Sans for tabular numeric data.
components.forms: Shadcn inputs/select heavily customized. Warm borders, soft padding (p-6 container). Inputs should have pure white background against the off-white page background.
components.buttons: Flat design, bg-[#2B5336] text-white hover:bg-[#1E3F20]. No heavy gradients.
components.cards: Subtle roundness max 8px border-radius. Cardless where possible using crisp grid borders.
components.navigation: Sticky glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) with solid bottom border on mobile. Sidebar for desktop with solid #FCFBF8 background.

motion.hover_states: Cards elevate slightly (-translate-y-1) with shadow-md. Buttons background color darkens on hover with text-white explicitly set.
motion.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease
motion.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Add aria-hidden='true' to purely decorative items.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for text below 18px. Active/focus states must have higher contrast ring-2 ring-[#2B5336].
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='masjid-add-button', data-testid='salah-export-pdf').

image_urls.description: Modern minimalist white mosque structure, used for login page or dashboard hero banner with heavy gradient overlay.
Minimal mosque dome for default masjid avatar or placeholder.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn components but customize them: Calendar for dates, Select for waqth charts, Dialog for masjid details on mobile.
Build a mobile-first 'Overview & Details' layout for Masjids List and Salah tables.
Data table numeric values MUST use IBM Plex Sans (or font-mono) for tabular lining.
Ensure the generated Salah calculations support row-level free input for fixed time overrides per prayer.
